name: 古典诗词教学课程
subject: chinese
author: weponusa
description: A comprehensive multi-chapter course on Classical Chinese Poetry teaching methodology, covering recitation techniques, tonal patterns, rhyme and parallelism, imagery interpretation, and poetic genre analysis.
description_zh: 古典诗词系统课程，涵盖诵读技法、平仄格律、押韵与对仗、意象解读、诗体辨析五大模块。以诵读为核心，知识碎玉化植入，适合教师研修与学生进阶。
